text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(…Wh— 
What do I do…!?)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
(There's not much time until the exhibition… 
And I still don't have any ideas!)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: If I don't have anything by the big day, then…

text_block_list.name: Attendee A
text_block_list.text:
You hear about that one artist? 
Apparently she couldn't make the deadline!

text_block_list.name: Attendee B
text_block_list.text: Man, I was looking forward to seeing her new piece… Guess it goes to show going viral doesn't count for much——

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…N-No…! 
I can't let that happen…!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (…At the rate things are going, I'm going to mess things up for Love-chan, too…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (…If I have to bother her either way… I should just talk to her at this point…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: Even if… I end up letting her down…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
——Phew. That wasn't bad. 
I think that running might be able to get my love across.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (…If I remember correctly, she's supposed to be training here today…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
Um… 
Love, uh, chan…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
! 
Maru-chan…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
——Listen, I'm about to go all out! 
So keep your eyes on me, Maru-chan!

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (——She's running forward, one step after another, without hesitation. It's like she's telling me… As long as I have love, there's nothing to fear.)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (Her running is always… so…)

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: ——Ah…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: …So beautiful…

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: (So strong, just like back then… No, so much more than that. She's——)

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: Maru-chan!

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
What do you see? 
What mental picture am I making you paint!?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
…Teehee. 
Well? How'd you like my running?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
Um… You were, um, lovely. 
And… When you were running, you… 
You looked at me, right?

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
Somehow, that… Gave me the feeling that you were inviting me… 
I wonder why…

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
…Maybe you read my thoughts? 
You had a look on your face that was screaming "I wanna run"! 
In fact, you still do.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text: …R-Really?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
Say, Maru-chan. I don't blame you for wanting to make everyone happy. 
It shows how much love you've got to give. But——

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text: I don't think that's the only reason you work so hard.

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
It's the other way around. 
Whatever you create… as long as you put your heart into it, I'm sure it'll make everyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
…… 
…Thank you, Love-chan. 
I… I figured out what I want to make.

text_block_list.name: Marche Lorraine
text_block_list.text:
You're the reason I figured it out… 
So… are we… still a team? 
Can we keep pouring our hearts into this piece? …Together?

text_block_list.name: Loves Only You
text_block_list.text:
! 
Of course we can! 
Let's pour our hearts into it—— 
And a whole lot of love!
Social media went abuzz at the opening of the exhibition. The center of attention was a small wood carving of an Umamusume, smiling with her hand outstretched.
It seemed as if merely touching her hand would make her take off running. Even a total stranger's heart would race when presented with such an incredible piece.
